Check out the trailer for the theatrical event of BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War – The Calamity! The beginning of the end is upon us!

BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War – The Calamity premieres in theatres June 25-29.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mina the Hollower: Don't Miss These 10 Early Game Trinkets!
There are tons of trinkets to collect in Mina the Hollower. You'll be finding them throughout your entire journey, but there are 10 in particular that you'll want to grab as soon as possible. Some of them are for sale, some of them are side quest rewards, but in all cases, they shouldn't be missed. Follow along with this guide to find them all.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game - Official Azula Developer Overview
Don't miss the Azula Developer Overview for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game (working title), an upcoming 2D anime action fighting game based on the hit Avatar: The Last Airbender and The Legend of Korra series, developed by Gameplay Group International in collaboration with Paramount. 
Players can check out the developer-led rundown on Azula's gameplay mechanics to best utilize both of the princess's stances, air dashes, and flaming traps. Turn up the heat of any battle with Azula in Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game, launching on July 2 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with an eventual release on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2.

Preorder on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2424420/Avatar_Legends_The_Fighting_Game/

Wishlist on PS5: 
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018989/

Wishlist on Xbox Series X|S: 
https://www.xbox.com/en-us/games/store/avatar-legends-the-fighting-game/9ph2332vrwsf

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie - Exclusive Easter Eggs Clip (2026)
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is now available exclusively on digital platforms to watch with no ads or subscription required, and will be released on 4K Ultra HD, and Blu-ray June 16th, 2026 from Universal Pictures Home Entertainment. With over an hour of never-before-seen bonus content, fans can power-up their movie night experience with a guided deep dive into the Easter eggs hidden throughout the film, exclusive behind-the-scenes interviews with the all-star cast and more.

Brimming with cleverly hidden Easter eggs, the film invites fans to return again and again to catch them all. In this feature, the filmmakers and cast offer insider guidance on where to look, what to watch for, and the surprises waiting to be discovered.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Ribbon Hero - Official Teaser Trailer (English Subtitles)
Inspired by Osamu Tezuka's classic "Princess Knight," THE RIBBON HERO follows Sapphire as she overcomes loss and trauma to protect those she holds dear. This new anime film arrives August 8, 2026, only on Netflix.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Rocket League - Official Season 23 Teaser Trailer
Check out this new teaser for Season 23 of Rocket League! The tournament is going global, in collaboration with the FIFA World Cup! 
We'll be eagerly anticipating more news when Season 23 of Rocket League races into the goal soon!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 - Official "From The Ward Ep.1" Video
Check out this new look at the development of Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4. Hear from Infinity Ward directly as they touch on bringing the story to South Korea, the performance capture techniques used to bring the cast to life, the new characters coming to the narrative and of course, Captain Price's one-man war from the shadows. 

Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4 launches on October 23rd 2026 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Nintendo Switch 2, PC (BattleNet, Steam, Xbox on PC) and Xbox Series X|S.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
30 Racing Game Masterpieces You Need to Play - IGN30
As IGN celebrates its 30th anniversary, it’s our job to assemble a list of 30 racing games that can lay claim to being bona fide masterpieces. 

We’re not just talking about great racing games. We’re talking about the premier racing games that define entire developers to this day. We’re talking about the greatest works of the world’s most respected racing studios, from Papyrus Design Group to Polyphony Digital.
With that foundation in mind, here are IGN’s racing game masterpieces – 30 esteemed and extraordinary racing games that maintain a stranglehold on our imaginations and are regarded as high-water marks for the whole genre.

#IGN #Top30 #RacingGames

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Solarpunk- Official Game Pass Reveal Trailer
Check out this new trailer for Solarpunk, a first person cosy survival game from Rokaplay and Cyberware! High above the clouds, either solo or with friends, create your ideal community, grow food and design gadgets to aid you! 
Solarpunk will be available on PC (Steam, Epic, GoG), Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Nintendo Switch 2 on June 8, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Hell Let Loose: Vietnam - Official Developer Open Beta Overview
Check out the Developer Open Beta Overview for Hell Let Loose: Vietnam, a first-person action strategy shooter developed by Expression Games. Players will get the rundown with Paul Rustchynsky, Game Director, on what players can expect in the open beta. Head into the action now with the open beta for Hell Let Loose: Vietnam, running now through June 1 with the game launching on June 18 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Wuthering Waves x Cyberpunk: Edgerunners - Official Collaboration Area Trailer
Don't miss the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaboration Area Trailer for Wuthering Waves, the hit free-to-play open-world action game developed by Kuro Games. Players will soon be able to explore Somnoire: Night City, a bustling concrete jungle region that's shrouded in eternal night, revealing a completely different cityscape. The Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaboration is launching into Wuthering Waves on June 8 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), iOS, Android, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mina the Hollower - Official Launch Trailer
Mina the Hollower is available now on Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, Steam, Humble, and GOG. Watch the Mina the Hollower launch trailer for this action-adventure game from the developers of Shovel Knight. Take control of Mina, a renowned Hollower hurtled into a desperate mission to rescue a cursed island. Whip foes, burrow through the ground, and explore a pixel-perfect world in Mina the Hollower.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Forget UE5: Huge Franchises Likely Using Unreal Engine 6  - Next-Gen Console Watch
Welcome back to Next-Gen Console Watch! This week Epic Games unveiled the sixth generation of Unreal, appropriately titled Unreal Engine 6. Rocket League will be the first game to get the UE6 makeover, but certainly not the last. Daemon, Ryan, and Max take a look at some of the biggest franchises that will very likely make the jump to UE6—even if many games haven't taken full advantage of Unreal Engine 5 yet. Plus we have last week's poll results, and a new poll for you to vote on at IGN.com and Spotify.
